# Buildwise Media

> AI-native marketing agency delivering automated marketing engines for service businesses.

## About
Buildwise Media builds automated, AI-powered marketing engines for service business owners. We handle research, strategy, website development, content creation, advertising management, and marketing automation — so you can focus on your craft.

## Services
- **Ascend** — Full marketing engine: research, strategy, website, content, ads, follow-up automation, monthly optimization
- **Ascend Lite** — Starter engine: conversion-optimized website, online booking, local SEO setup

## Service Area
United States (remote)
